# Alexandria Tire & Lube
> Auto repair and tire service, Alexandria, Louisiana

Professional automotive service center providing tire installation, oil changes, and comprehensive auto repair services to Alexandria, Louisiana and surrounding Central Louisiana areas.

## Services
- New Tire Installation
- Used Tires
- Tire Repair
- Tire Rotations & Alignments
- Tire Balancing
- Oil Changes & Fluid Maintenance

## Service Area
Alexandria, Pineville, Ball, Boyce, and Woodworth, Louisiana

## Contact
- Phone: (318) 201-0014
- Address: 1776 Jackson St, Alexandria, LA 71301
- Website: https://alexandria-tire-and-lube.vercel.app

## Hours
- Monday–Thursday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Friday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Saturday–Sunday: Closed

## Key Pages
- Home Page(/): Professional auto service and tire installation in Alexandria, LA
- About(/about): About Alexandria Tire & Lube
- Contact(/contact): Contact and location information

## About
Alexandria Tire & Lube is a trusted automotive service center serving Alexandria, Louisiana and the surrounding Central Louisiana area. Safety certified and an authorized dealer, our experienced mechanics provide quality tire installation, oil changes, and comprehensive auto repair services with reliable, professional care.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What types of tires do you install?**
We install all major tire brands and sizes for cars, trucks, and SUVs — both new and used.

**How often should I change my oil?**
Most vehicles need oil changes every 3,000–5,000 miles, depending on your vehicle and driving conditions.

**Do you offer same-day service?**
Yes, we provide same-day service for most tire installations and oil changes.

**What areas do you serve?**
We serve Alexandria, Pineville, Ball, Boyce, Woodworth, and the surrounding Central Louisiana area.

**Do you provide warranties on your work?**
Yes, we stand behind our work with warranties on parts and labor.
